description: Defensive academic validation dataset of public-source-derived web server configuration fixtures.

samples.license: BSD-2-Clause in the source repository; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises the common Docker-style nginx.conf plus conf.d default server shape.

samples.license: Documentation example used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Covers a proxy deployment with upstreams, proxy headers, and an admin path.

samples.license: Documentation example used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises TLS listener analysis with inherited http-scope TLS directives.

samples.license: Apache License 2.0 in the source repository; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises a compact version of the common containerized httpd baseline.

samples.source_name: Apache HTTP Server virtual host and .htaccess documentation
samples.license: Apache License 2.0 for Apache HTTP Server documentation; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises Include handling, vhost-scoped directives, and discovered .htaccess overrides.

samples.source_name: Apache HTTP Server SSL/TLS virtual host documentation
samples.license: Apache License 2.0 for Apache HTTP Server documentation; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises TLS virtual host policy without requiring certificate files to exist.

samples.license: BSD-3-Clause in the source repository; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises lighttpd variables, include globbing, access logging, and directory listing.

samples.license: Official documentation used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises FastCGI, TLS socket settings, and host-conditional status configuration.

samples.license: Microsoft Learn documentation used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises request filtering and IIS custom header handling in a standalone web.config.

samples.source_name: Microsoft Learn ASP.NET debug and error-handling documentation
samples.license: Microsoft Learn documentation used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises common development web.config settings that should not drift into production.

samples.source_name: Microsoft Learn IIS ApplicationHost sites documentation
samples.license: Microsoft Learn documentation used as structure only; this fixture is a minimized derived example.
samples.why_useful: Exercises applicationHost.config parsing, site bindings, and app-pool metadata.
